name: Dalian Energas Gas-System Co., Ltd.
summary: Dalian Energas Gas-System Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, sells, and services fuel gas transmission-distribution systems and related products in China and internationally. Its primary products include fuel gas distribution systems, fuel gas application systems, spare parts, etc. The company's application system products comprise auxiliary equipment for gas turbines, material supply directly pipes for gas turbines, and seal pipes of steam turbines. It also provides gas distribution systems comprising boosting stations, reducing stations, long-distance pipeline distribution systems, offshore platform distribution systems, and city gate stations; gas application systems consisting of final and fuel, water washing, and lubricating oil skids, as well as MSD and seal piping systems; and distributed energy solutions, such as combined cooling heating and power systems. In addition, the company offers fuel gas pressure regulating boxes and regulators, and LNG gas filling stations. Further, it provides manufacturing, packing, transportation, erection, commissioning, start-up, and after sale services. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Dalian, China.
